COPILOT.TITLE: Copilot
COPILOT.KICK_OFF_MESSAGE: Your AI teammate for support workflows. Ask anything to get started.

SUMMARIZE.LABEL: Summarize this conversation
SUMMARIZE.CONTENT: Give me a summary of this conversation so far.

SUGGEST.LABEL: Suggest a reply
SUGGEST.CONTENT: Suggest a reply I can send to the customer.

RATE.LABEL: Rate this conversation
RATE.CONTENT: Rate the quality of this conversation and explain why.

HIGH_PRIORITY.LABEL: High-priority conversations
HIGH_PRIORITY.CONTENT: Show me the high-priority conversations that need attention right now.

LIST_CONTACTS.LABEL: List recent contacts
LIST_CONTACTS.CONTENT: List the contacts that have reached out in the last 24 hours.

FAQS.PENDING_BANNER: You have pending FAQs to review
FAQS.KNOW_MORE_NOTE: Pilot FAQs detects common customer questions—whether missing from your knowledge base or frequently asked—and generates relevant FAQs to improve support. You can review each suggestion and decide whether to approve or reject it.
FAQS.EMPTY_BODY: Build an FAQ knowledge base to help your assistant answer common questions.

CARD.DELETE_CONFIRM: Delete this FAQ? This cannot be undone.

DIALOG.ANSWER_PLACEHOLDER: Use markdown for **bold**, *italics*, links, and lists.
